question: ज्या कुटुंबांची पूर्णता स्थिती (completion status) 'Located' आहे, कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (household split number) ० आहे आणि नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (new household split number) १ आहे, अशा कुटुंबांसाठी युनिक पीएसयू (PSU) कोड चढत्या क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध करा.

FROM fact_household_core fhc

WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fhc.household_split_number = 0
  AND fhc.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dgh.psu_code ASC;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांसाठी नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (new household split number) शून्य नाही, अशा कुटुंबांच्या जिल्हा कोडची आणि एकूण कुटुंब आयडीच्या (household IDs) संख्येची यादी करा. ही माहिती जिल्हा कोडनुसार गटबद्ध (group) करा आणि पहिल्या १० निकालांसाठी ही संख्या उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.

predicted_sql:

JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy gh ON fhc.geography_id = gh.geography_id

GROUP BY district_code
ORDER BY household_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

gold_sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION, COUNT(T2.MIGRANT_ID) FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = 1 GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ORDER BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION
predicted_sql:
SELECT dmr.reason_description, COUNT(fmb.migrant_id) AS total_migrant_ids
FROM dim_migration_reasons dmr
LEFT JOIN fact_migration_behavior fmb ON dmr.migration_reason_id = fmb.migration_reason_id
WHERE dmr.migration_reason_id = 1
GROUP BY dmr.reason_description
ORDER BY dmr.reason_description;
raw_output:
SELECT dmr.reason_description, COUNT(fmb.migrant_id) AS total_migrant_ids
FROM dim_migration_reasons dmr
LEFT JOIN fact_migration_behavior fmb ON dmr.migration_reason_id = fmb.migration_reason_id
WHERE dmr.migration_reason_id = 1

question: स्थलांतराच्या कारणांचे वर्णन सूचीबद्ध करा, विशेषतः अशा प्रकरणांसाठी जिथे स्थलांतरापासूनची वर्षे तीनपेक्षा जास्त आहेत आणि स्थलांतराचे कारण स्थलांतराच्या वेळी विवाहित असलेल्या व्यक्तींशी संबंधित आहे, हे वर्णन गटबद्ध करून अकारविल्हे (alphabetically) क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T2.YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION > 3 AND T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID IN (SELECT T3.MIGRATION_REASON_ID FROM FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T3 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T4 ON T3.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T4.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE = 'Married') GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ORDER BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_migration_reasons.reason_description
FROM fact_migration_behavior
JOIN dim_migration_reasons ON fact_migration_behavior.migration_reason_id = dim_migration_reasons.migration_reason_id
JOIN fact_migrant_personal ON fact_migration_behavior.migrant_id = fact_migrant_personal.migrant_id
WHERE fact_migration_behavior.years_since_migration > 3
AND fact_migrant_personal.marital_status_at_migration_code ILIKE 'Married'
GROUP BY dim_migration_reasons.reason_description
ORDER BY dim_migration_reasons.reason_description;

question: ज्या स्थलांतरितांच्या स्थलांतराचे कारण 'Married' (विवाहित) असे वर्णन केले आहे, अशा सर्व स्थलांतरितांचा आयडी (Migrant ID), स्थलांतराच्या वेळची वैवाहिक स्थिती (Marital status code) आणि रोजगाराचा प्रकार (Employment type) यांची यादी द्या; या तीन वैशिष्ट्यांनुसार त्यांचे गट करा आणि स्थलांतरित आयडीनुसार (Migrant ID) क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.MIGRANT_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T1.MIGRANT_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID AND T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T4 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T5 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T5.MIGRANT_ID AND T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T4.REASON_DESCRIPTION = 'Married' GROUP BY T1.MIGRANT_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE ORDER BY T1.MIGRANT_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT fm.migrant_id, fm.marital_status_at_migration_code, de.employment_type
FROM fact_migrant_personal fm
JOIN fact_migrant_employment fme ON fm.migrant_id = fme.migrant_id
JOIN dim_employment_status de ON fme.employment_status_id = de.employment_status_id
JOIN fact_migration_behavior fmb ON fm.migrant_id = fmb.migrant_id
JOIN dim_migration_reasons dmr ON fmb.migration_reason_id = dmr.migration_reason_id
WHERE dmr.reason_description ILIKE 'Married'
GROUP BY fm.migrant_id, fm.marital_status_at_migration_code, de.employment_type
ORDER BY fm.migrant_id;
raw_output:
SELECT fm.migrant_id, fm.marital_status_at_migration_code, de.employment_type
FROM fact_migrant_personal fm
JOIN fact_migrant_employment fme ON fm.migrant_id = fme.migrant_id
JOIN dim_employment_status de ON fme.employment_status_id = de.employment_status_id
JOIN fact_migration_behavior fmb ON fm.migrant_id = fmb.migrant_id
JOIN dim_migration_reasons dmr ON fmb.migration_reason_id = dmr.migration_reason_id
WHERE dmr.reason_description ILIKE 'Married'
GROUP BY fm.migrant_id, fm.marital_status_at_migration_code, de.employment_type
ORDER BY fm.migrant_id;

question: ज्या स्थलांतरितांनी लग्नामुळे स्थलांतर केले आहे, परंतु त्यांच्या स्थलांतरित होतानाचे वैवाहिक स्थितीचे सूचक 'नाही' (No) असे नोंदवले गेले आहे, अशा व्यक्तींचा आयडी (ID), स्थलांतराच्या वेळचा वैवाहिक स्थिती कोड आणि रोजगाराचा प्रकार यांची यादी द्या; या तीन वैशिष्ट्यांनुसार त्यांचे गट करा आणि व्यक्ती आयडीनुसार (person ID) क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T1.MIGRANT_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID AND T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T4 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T5 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T5.MIGRANT_ID AND T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T4.REASON_DESCRIPTION = 'Married' AND T1.MARRIED_WHEN_MIGRATED_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE ORDER BY T1.PERSON_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    fp.person_id,
    fmp.marital_status_at_migration_code,
    des.employment_type
FROM 
    fact_migrant_personal fmp
    JOIN fact_migrant_employment fem ON fmp.migrant_id = fem.migrant_id
    JOIN dim_employment_status des ON fem.employment_status_id = des.employment_status_id
    JOIN fact_migration_behavior fmb ON fmp.migrant_id = fmb.migrant_id
    JOIN dim_migration_reasons dmr ON fmb.migration_reason_id = dmr.migration_reason_id
    JOIN fact_person_core fp ON fmp.person_id = fp.person_id
WHERE 
    dmr.reason_description ILIKE 'Married'
    AND fmp.married_when_migrated_indicator ILIKE 'No'
GROUP BY 
    fp.person_id,
    fmp.marital_status_at_migration_code,
    des.employment_type
ORDER BY 
    fp.person_id;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    fp.person_id,
    fmp.marital_status_at_migration_code,
    des.employment_type
FROM 
    fact_migrant_personal fmp
    JOIN fact_migrant_employment fem ON fmp.migrant_id = fem.migrant_id
    JOIN dim_employment_status des ON fem.employment_status_id = des.employment_status_id
    JOIN fact_migration_behavior fmb ON fmp.migrant_id = fmb.migrant_id
    JOIN dim_migration_reasons dmr ON fmb.migration_reason_id = dmr.migration_reason_id
    JOIN fact_person_core fp ON fmp.person_id = fp.person_id
WHERE 
    dmr.reason_description ILIKE 'Married'
    AND fmp.married_when_migrated_indicator ILIKE 'No'
GROUP BY 
    fp.person_id,
    fmp.marital_status_at_migration_code,
    des.employment_type
ORDER BY 
    fp.person_id;

question: 'राजस्थान' राज्यातील अशा कुटुंबांसाठी भौगोलिक श्रेणीमधील PSU कोडची यादी करा जिथे पूर्णत्वाची स्थिती (completion status) 'Located' आहे, त्यांच्या PSU कोडनुसार गटबद्ध करा, जेणेकरून त्यांच्या कुटुंबातील स्प्लिट नंबरची एकूण बेरीज नेमकी शून्य असेल आणि निकाल PSU कोडनुसार चढत्या क्रमाने लावा.
